Objective To study the best therapeutic method of spastic hemiplegia.
Objective: Norms for patients with hemiplegia early rehabilitation for limb function.
During childhood, hemiplegia is often caused by a stroke, like Peter's, when a bleed or clot damages part of the brain.
Injury to the left side of the brain will cause a right hemiplegia and injury to the right side a left hemiplegia.
